description_for_model: DPX is a programmable stablecoin settlement rail with a 6-tier macro-intelligent stability oracle. Use this to get real-time stability scores, fee quotes, ESG-weighted fees, and execute cross-border settlements. Call /manifest first to discover full capabilities, then /quote to price a transaction, then /verify-fees to confirm on-chain alignment before settlement. Fees: 0.85% core + 0.40% FX (cross-currency only) + 0.00–0.50% ESG (live from oracle) + 0.01% license. Typical all-in: 1.385% at ESG score 75, cross-border.
description_for_human: Real-time DPX stablecoin stability oracle with agent-native pricing, ESG-weighted fees, and programmable settlement rails on Base mainnet.
